## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm check` passes locally (lint + typecheck + format + coverage >= 95%).
- [ ] Tests added or updated.
- [ ] Docs updated (and OpenAPI doc, for API changes).
- [ ] No inline code comments.

## Responsiveness (UI changes only)

Verified at 360 / 640 / 768 / 1024 / 1280px:

- [ ] No horizontal scroll at 360px.
- [ ] Tap targets >= 44x44px.
- [ ] Body text >= 14px; layout reflows without overflow.
- [ ] Visible focus order preserved.
- [ ] `prefers-reduced-motion` respected.
